default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content performance, strategies for improvement, and upcoming plans.](https://fathom.video/share/izNrro3rX-nDeEY1vqJpoRYKqQrQ-Xaa?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance is improving, with best week yet for clicks (760) and impressions (314.6K)](https://fathom.video/share/izNrro3rX-nDeEY1vqJpoRYKqQrQ-Xaa?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Team aims to reach \~1000 clicks/week to hit lead generation goals; currently at \~137 clicks/week](https://fathom.video/share/izNrro3rX-nDeEY1vqJpoRYKqQrQ-Xaa?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Article enrichment plan developed to boost engagement and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/izNrro3rX-nDeEY1vqJpoRYKqQrQ-Xaa?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
  - [Website redesign in progress; team open to UX improvement suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/izNrro3rX-nDeEY1vqJpoRYKqQrQ-Xaa?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Goals

  - [Best week for clicks (760) and impressions (314.6K) after a 2-week slump](https://fathom.video/share/izNrro3rX-nDeEY1vqJpoRYKqQrQ-Xaa?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Current conversion rate: 0.5% for GrowthX articles, 1.5% for Webstacks content, 1.8% for AI articles](https://fathom.video/share/izNrro3rX-nDeEY1vqJpoRYKqQrQ-Xaa?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Aim: 1000 clicks/week for sustainable lead generation (based on 1% conversion rate)](https://fathom.video/share/izNrro3rX-nDeEY1vqJpoRYKqQrQ-Xaa?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Strategy: Focus on incremental improvements, compound growth, and identifying high-performing pieces](https://fathom.video/share/izNrro3rX-nDeEY1vqJpoRYKqQrQ-Xaa?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Strategies for Improvement

  - [Enrich existing content to boost engagement and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/izNrro3rX-nDeEY1vqJpoRYKqQrQ-Xaa?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
  - [Sample and scale successful content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/izNrro3rX-nDeEY1vqJpoRYKqQrQ-Xaa?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
  - [Prioritize topics with higher lead capture rates (e.g., design, depth, CMS)](https://fathom.video/share/izNrro3rX-nDeEY1vqJpoRYKqQrQ-Xaa?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [Consider alternative content types beyond blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/izNrro3rX-nDeEY1vqJpoRYKqQrQ-Xaa?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
  - [Implement internal linking strategies (e.g., footer links, blog index)](https://fathom.video/share/izNrro3rX-nDeEY1vqJpoRYKqQrQ-Xaa?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)

### Article Enrichment Plan

  - [Add "In Brief" summary section at the top of articles](https://fathom.video/share/izNrro3rX-nDeEY1vqJpoRYKqQrQ-Xaa?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)
  - [Improve article intros with more engaging hooks and social proof](https://fathom.video/share/izNrro3rX-nDeEY1vqJpoRYKqQrQ-Xaa?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)
  - [Balance headers and bullet points for better readability](https://fathom.video/share/izNrro3rX-nDeEY1vqJpoRYKqQrQ-Xaa?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)
  - [Optimize for mobile (60-70% of traffic)](https://fathom.video/share/izNrro3rX-nDeEY1vqJpoRYKqQrQ-Xaa?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
  - [Add author bios and credentials for E-A-T improvement](https://fathom.video/share/izNrro3rX-nDeEY1vqJpoRYKqQrQ-Xaa?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
  - [Implement sticky navigation and lead magnets](https://fathom.video/share/izNrro3rX-nDeEY1vqJpoRYKqQrQ-Xaa?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
  - [Conduct A/B tests on CTAs and conversion panels](https://fathom.video/share/izNrro3rX-nDeEY1vqJpoRYKqQrQ-Xaa?tab=summary&timestamp=1888.0)

### Website Redesign

  - [New design in progress, to be implemented within next few months](https://fathom.video/share/izNrro3rX-nDeEY1vqJpoRYKqQrQ-Xaa?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
  - [Team open to feedback on UX improvements](https://fathom.video/share/izNrro3rX-nDeEY1vqJpoRYKqQrQ-Xaa?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
  - [Plans to add new components (e.g., video integration, case study links)](https://fathom.video/share/izNrro3rX-nDeEY1vqJpoRYKqQrQ-Xaa?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
  - [Considering distraction-free blog layout inspired by industry leaders](https://fathom.video/share/izNrro3rX-nDeEY1vqJpoRYKqQrQ-Xaa?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Start implementing article enrichments immediately, aiming to complete first 10 by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/izNrro3rX-nDeEY1vqJpoRYKqQrQ-Xaa?tab=summary&timestamp=2048.0)
  - [Devon to propose next batch of 10 articles for enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/izNrro3rX-nDeEY1vqJpoRYKqQrQ-Xaa?tab=summary&timestamp=2085.0)

  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to discuss quarterly targets and align on expectations](https://fathom.video/share/izNrro3rX-nDeEY1vqJpoRYKqQrQ-Xaa?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
